title: Junior Instructional Designer at IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Join the IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions family as a Instructional Designer in Kolkata. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions:
IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions!
